fields.name: messageId
fields.description: Unique identifier for this sanctions list hit notification message

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the message was generated and sent

fields.name: destination
fields.description: Target system identifier for this message

fields.name: sanctionsListHit
fields.description: Container for all sanctions screening match details and remediation information

children.name: hitId
children.description: Unique identifier for this specific sanctions list match event

children.name: severity
children.description: Risk severity level assigned to this sanctions hit

children.name: status
children.description: Current workflow status of the sanctions hit review

children.name: matchedEntity
children.description: Details of the customer or entity that matched sanctions screening criteria

children.name: entityId
children.description: Internal unique identifier for the matched entity within the bank

children.name: entityType
children.description: Classification of the entity type

children.name: name
children.description: Full legal name of the matched entity

children.name: dateOfBirth
children.description: Date of birth of the individual entity, if available

children.name: nationality
children.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code representing the entity's nationality

children.name: identificationDocuments
children.description: Array of identification documents associated with the matched entity

children.name: type
children.description: Type of identification document

children.name: number
children.description: Document reference number or serial

children.name: issuingCountry
children.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the document issuing authority

children.name: sanctionListsMatched
children.description: Array of sanctions lists on which the entity was matched

children.name: listName
children.description: Official name or identifier of the sanctions list

children.name: listVersion
children.description: Version or publication date of the sanctions list used for screening

children.name: matchScore
children.description: Confidence score (0.0 to 1.0) indicating the strength of the match

children.name: matchFields
children.description: Array of entity field names that contributed to the match (e.g., name, dateOfBirth, nationality)

children.name: riskFactors
children.description: Array of risk indicators or aggravating factors identified during screening

children.name: associatedAccounts
children.description: Array of bank accounts linked to the matched entity that require action

children.name: accountNumber
children.description: Account identifier or IBAN

children.name: accountType
children.description: Classification of the account product type

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the account

children.name: status
children.description: Current operational status of the account

children.name: reviewDetails
children.description: Compliance review workflow and assignment information

children.name: assignedTo
children.description: User identifier or role of the compliance officer assigned to review this hit

children.name: reviewDeadline
children.description: ISO 8601 deadline by which the compliance review must be completed

children.name: notes
children.description: Free-text notes or context provided by the screening system or compliance team

children.name: requiredActions
children.description: Array of mandatory actions to be taken in response to this sanctions hit

children.name: auditTrail
children.description: Audit and provenance information for the sanctions screening detection

children.name: detectionTimestamp
children.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the sanctions match was first detected by the screening engine

children.name: detectionMethod
children.description: Method or trigger used to perform the sanctions screening

children.name: screeningEngine
children.description: Name and version of the sanctions screening software or service used
